Risk_Description: Unauthorized users retain access after termination leading to data breach.
Control_Description: HR notifies IT within 24 hours of termination. IT disables Active Directory and ERP access within 1 business day.

Risk_Description: Unauthorized code deployed to production causing system downtime.
Control_Description: All production changes must be accompanied by a Jira ticket approved by the CAB (Change Advisory Board) prior to deployment.

Risk_Description: Batch job failures go unnoticed impacting financial month-end close.
Control_Description: Automated alerts are sent to the IT Operations team for any batch job failures. Helpdesk tickets are automatically generated.
